author: y4rr
content: Observation: The Fixture struct has 'shape: Option<Vec<usize>>' but NOT 'input_shape'. The all_gather_world_size_2 and reduce_scatter_world_size_2_sum fixtures in fixtures.json emit 'input_shape' not 'shape' for the input tensor shape. Since serde skips unknown fields by default, input_shape is silently dropped and f.shape is None, triggering a panic on .expect(). The fix is adding an input_shape field to the Fixture struct with serde(default) and reading it in the affected tests.
